title: Fazbear's Playdate D
description: Turn the Playdate mod into FNAF!
body:
Note: this is NOT a standalone mod. This is a datapack that changes loot tables and recipes for the mod 'playdate', which is not made by me. Do not ask me for a 1.19+ port, I can't do that. Playdate is moving forwards without the horror aspect, and this pack is completely impossible without the horror aspect. Do not harass the people behind playdate, even though it is sad that this pack is stuck on 1.18.2 now.

VERY IMPORTANT: The 1.18.2 versions of playdate this pack can be can be applied to are not available on modrinth. They are available on that other source of mc mods, but I have moved this pack here because current events have made me want to move away from that source.

Because the pack literally has no business being here otherwise, use this with the resourcepack that changes the assets: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fazbears-playdate-r

Fazbear's Playdate (datapack) is a datapack that changes the recipes of almost everything in the playdate mod to fit with the resource pack.
This also adds a loot table that allows villagers to drop remnant infested cloth when killed, which can be turned into remnant in a bottle. (I have tried making this only drop from baby villagers, but it turns out minecraft is hardcoded to not allow anything to be dropped by babies.)
